subject: docs(claude): note that even the permission prompt breaks session
body:
The AskUserQuestion tool damages the session at the permission-approval
stage, before it even executes. Added note clarifying there is no safe
way to invoke it.

Tags: docs, ai-notes
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 5
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ai-workflow
Semver: patch
